member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer
member.summary: The primary entry point for the Velocity SDK. Provides connection management, real-time event streaming, person/credential CRUD, alarm monitoring, door/group management, operator administration, and hardware status queries against the Velocity access control system.
member.remarks: Internally, VelocityServer connects to the Velocity host service via a TCP socket for real-time events, and directly to the Velocity SQL Server database for data queries. It maintains an internal SQL connection pool and manages credential download scheduling.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new instance with logging enabled. Initializes the internal function library, RPC command interface, and generates a unique session token.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a new instance with logging enabled. The bEnableLogging parameter is accepted but logging is always enabled internally.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance with logging directed to a custom folder.
member.param: Folder to write the SDK log file to. If the path exists, the log is written to {logFileFolderLocation}\Velocity_SDK_Log.txt. If the path does not exist, an error is logged and the default log location is used.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.SDKlicense
member.summary: SDK license key string. Set before connecting if required by licensing.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetServerIP
member.summary: IP address of the connected Velocity server. Empty string if not connected.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.AssemblyVersion
member.summary: Version string of the VelocityAdapter assembly. The getter returns the actual assembly version; the setter stores a bypass value used internally.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.OperatorID
member.summary: Numeric ID of the authenticated operator. Returns the impersonated operator ID if impersonation is active, otherwise the actual operator ID. Returns -1 if not connected.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.WorkstationID
member.summary: Numeric ID of the workstation established during connection. -1 if not connected.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.SiteID
member.summary: Numeric ID of the Velocity site. -1 if not connected.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ServerID
member.summary: Numeric ID of the Velocity server. -1 if not connected.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.isInternalSDK
member.summary: Indicates whether this instance is used internally by Velocity software (as opposed to third-party SDK consumers). Defaults to false.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.IsConnected
member.summary: Returns true if currently connected to the Velocity server.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.IsConnecting
member.summary: Returns true if a connection attempt is in progress and not yet connected. Returns false once connected.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ServerName
member.summary: Name of the connected Velocity server. Empty string if not connected.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.SQLServer
member.summary: SQL Server instance name/address used for the current connection.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Database
member.summary: Database name used for the current connection (typically "Velocity").

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.UseApplicationRole
member.summary: Whether to use SQL Server Application Roles for database access. When true, the SDK activates an application role on each SQL connection for elevated permissions.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.RPC
member.summary: Provides access to RPC (Remote Procedure Call) commands for direct hardware control — door lock/unlock, relay activation, alarm acknowledge, etc.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Token
member.summary: Unique session token generated at construction. Used to identify this SDK session with the Velocity server.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.VelocityRelease
member.summary: Version string of the connected Velocity server software (e.g., "3.7"). Empty until connected.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.KBRelease
member.summary: Knowledge base release number of the connected Velocity server. 0 until connected.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Version
member.summary: Parsed version object of the Velocity server. Static/shared across instances.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.isAdmin
member.summary: Returns true if the connected operator has administrator privileges.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Description
member.summary: User-defined description for this SDK instance.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.useThisAppRolePw
member.summary: Override the application role password instead of reading it from the Windows Registry. Set before calling a parameterless Connect() overload.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.DisconnectedMode
member.summary: When true, the SDK operates in offline/disconnected mode — it initializes the connection pool and loads cached objects without connecting to the Velocity host service socket.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ImpersonateUserName
member.summary: Set a username to impersonate a different operator. Used with ImpersonatePW for delegated access.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ImpersonatePW
member.summary: Password for the impersonated operator.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.SkipConnectionVerify
member.summary: When true, skips additional connection verification checks during the connect handshake.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.TheGroupID
member.summary: The security group ID of the connected operator. Used internally for permission boundary filtering.

member.name: E:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer._logMessage
member.summary: Fires when the SDK writes an internal log message. Subscribe to capture SDK diagnostic output.

member.name: E:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ConnectionSuccess
member.summary: Fires when a connection to the Velocity server is successfully established.

member.name: E:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.OnDisconnect
member.summary: Fires when the connection is lost or intentionally closed. The handler receives a bool indicating whether the disconnect was forced.

member.name: E:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ConnectionFailure
member.summary: Fires when a connection attempt fails. The handler receives the error message.

member.name: E:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ServerMessage

member.name: E:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.CommandError
member.summary: Fires when a command sent to a controller results in an error.

member.summary: Fires when a device's operational state changes (e.g., online/offline). The handler receives device type, controller ID, and status string.

member.name: E:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.AlarmActive
member.summary: Fires when a new alarm is triggered. The IAlarmActive object contains alarm ID, event ID, description, address, timestamps, and severity level.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Connect
member.summary: Connects to the Velocity server using settings from the Windows Registry (HKLM\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\Hirsch Electronics\Velocity\Client). Reads SQL Server, Database, and ApplicationRole values. The application role password is decrypted automatically. Uses default timeouts of 15 seconds.
member.remarks: If useThisAppRolePw is set, uses that value instead of the registry application role. If DisconnectedMode is true, skips the socket connection and initializes in offline mode.
member.exception: Thrown if the operator is not authorized.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Connect(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Same as Connect() but with custom timeout values (in seconds).

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Connect(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Connects using Windows Registry settings with full control over async, timeouts, and application role usage.
member.param: Whether to activate a SQL Server application role.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ConnectWithoutAppRole
member.summary: Connects using Windows Registry settings but without activating a SQL Server Application Role. Uses default 15-second timeouts.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Connect(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Connects to a specific SQL Server and database using Windows Authentication, without an application role. Uses default 15/5-second timeouts.
member.param: SQL Server instance name or address (e.g., "SERVER\VELOCITY").

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Connect(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Connects without an application role, with custom timeouts.
member.param: SQL Server instance name or address.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Connect(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Connects with an explicit (plaintext) application role password. Uses 10-second timeouts.
member.param: SQL Server instance name or address.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Connect(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Connects with an application role and custom timeouts.
member.param: SQL Server instance name or address.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Connect(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Connects without an application role, providing explicit user credentials and Windows identity information. Used for non-interactive or service account scenarios.
member.param: SQL Server instance name or address.
Windows username to associate with the session.
Windows hostname to associate with the session.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ConnectDecrypt(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Connects with an encrypted application role password (as stored in the Windows Registry). The SDK decrypts the value before use. Falls back to plaintext if decryption fails.
member.param: SQL Server instance name or address.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ConnectNoCheck(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Connects with an application role but skips operator permission checks. Useful for service accounts or system-level integrations that need database access without operator validation.
member.param: SQL Server instance name or address.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ConnectWithEncryptedAppRole(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Connects with an encrypted application role plus explicit user credentials. Decrypts the app role, falls back to plaintext if decryption fails.
member.param: SQL Server instance name or address.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ConnectMixedModeSQL(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Connects using SQL Server Mixed Mode authentication (SQL login credentials rather than Windows Authentication).
member.param: SQL Server instance name or address.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Disconnect
member.summary: Gracefully disconnects from the Velocity server. Waits for any pending credential downloads to complete, flushes the download queue, closes the SQL connection pool, closes the TCP socket, stops keep-alive timers, and resets all connection state. Flushes the NLog logger.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.Disconnect(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disconnects with the option to force-close all SQL connections immediately rather than waiting for them to drain from the pool.
member.param: If true, force-closes all SQL connections immediately.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetAlarmLog(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Queries the [dbo].[AlarmLog] table for all alarm records with dtDate > sinceDate. Returns alarm details, operator actions, timestamps, and associated person names.
member.param: Returns records with dtDate strictly greater than this value.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetLogTransactions(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Queries [dbo].[Log_Transactions] for transaction records (card reads, access events) since the given date. Returns door, reader, zone, person, and disposition details.
member.param: Returns records with dtDate strictly greater than this value.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetSoftwareEvents(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Queries [dbo].[Log_Software] for software events since the given date (EventTime > sinceDate).
member.param: Returns records with EventTime strictly greater than this value.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetMiscEvents(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Queries [dbo].[Log_Misc] for miscellaneous event records since the given date.
member.param: Returns records with dtDate strictly greater than this value.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetInternalEvents(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Queries [dbo].[Log_Internal] for internal controller events since the given date.
member.param: Returns records with dtDate strictly greater than this value.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetExternalEvents(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Queries [Velocity].[dbo].[Log_External] for external/reader events since the given date.
member.param: Returns records with dtDate strictly greater than this value.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetPersons
member.summary: Returns an enumerator over all persons in the system.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetPersons(System.Int32@)
member.summary: Returns an enumerator over all persons, with the total count returned via the out parameter.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetPersons(VelocityAdapter.People.PersonFilter)
member.summary: Returns an enumerator over persons matching the given filter criteria. Use GetPersonFilter() to create a filter object.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetPersons(VelocityAdapter.People.PersonFilter,System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns an enumerator over persons matching the filter, with a custom SQL command timeout.

member.summary: Retrieves a single person by their numeric ID.
member.exception: Thrown if the person is not found or an error occurs.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetNewPerson
member.summary: Creates and returns a new, empty IPerson object ready to be populated and saved.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetNewPersonBasedOnTemplateID(System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new person pre-populated from a person template. Copies names (defaulting to "Template"), photo, signature, groups, folders, and user-defined fields from the template.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.copyTemplateToPerson(VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Copies properties from a person template onto an existing person. Copies names, user-defined fields (skipping AUTO_UNIQUE/AUTO_SEQUENTIAL types), photo, signature, groups, and folders.
member.param: Target person to apply the template to.
True if the person is newly created (affects which fields are copied).

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.copyTemplateToPerson(VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Copies template properties to a person, optionally ignoring blank template values.
member.param: Target person to apply the template to.
True if the person is newly created.
When true, blank/empty template fields are skipped rather than overwriting existing person data.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetPersonIDByCredentialID(System.Int32)
member.summary: Looks up the person ID associated with a credential ID.
member.returns: Person ID, or -1 if not found.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetPersonGroups
member.summary: Returns an enumerator over all person groups.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.AddPersonGroup(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new person group with the given name and returns its ID.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetPersonFilter
member.summary: Creates and returns a new PersonFilter object for use with GetPersons().

member.summary: Retrieves a person folder by its ID.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getPersonFolder(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetUnassignedCredentials

member.summary: Creates and returns a new CredentialFilter object for use with GetCredentials().

ID of the credential template to apply.
Person ID of the credential holder.

member.summary: Installs or updates the igs_UpdateUserCredentialFromTemplate stored procedure in the Velocity database.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GenerateMatch(VelocityAdapter.Credential.CredentialCardType,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a match code from card type and card data. Uses the CardFormat32.dll native library for 32-bit Wiegand formats. Handles special card types: PASS_THRU returns the card data directly, SPECIAL_CUSTOM21 uses custom conversion.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.ScheduleCredentialDownload
member.summary: Triggers the credential download scheduler to process pending downloads. Includes a 3-second delay for processing.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.pendingDownloadQueueCount
member.summary: Returns the number of credential downloads currently waiting in the queue.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.downloadTransactions(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sends a credential download transaction to the Velocity server for processing.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.setDelayPerCredentialDownload(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the delay (in milliseconds) between individual credential downloads to throttle controller load.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.cfmt_GenerateMatchCode(System.Int32,System.Text.StringBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: P/Invoke to CardFormat32.dll. Generates a match code from raw card input data using the specified card format ID.
member.param: Output buffer for the generated match code.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.XFRM_Do_Transformation(System.Int32,System.Text.StringBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: P/Invoke to CardFormat32.dll. Reverses a match code back to the original card input string using the specified format ID.
member.param: Output buffer for the restored input string.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.do_ReverseGenericNoParityWeigand(System.UInt32@,System.UInt32)
member.summary: P/Invoke to CardFormat32.dll. Performs a reverse generic no-parity Wiegand transformation.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getReverseGenericNoParityWeigand(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Wrapper for do_ReverseGenericNoParityWeigand. Returns the reversed Wiegand value for the given match code.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.get40BitMatchCode(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Generates a 40-bit match code (hex string) from a facility code and card ID. Calculates even/odd parity bits for the 40-bit Wiegand format.
member.returns: 40-bit match code as a hex string.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getRestoredInputString(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Converts a match code back to its original card input string using the specified format. Returns the match code unchanged if the transformation fails.
member.returns: Restored input string, or the match code if transformation fails.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getRestoredInputString(System.Int32,System.Text.StringBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Converts a match code back to its original input string, writing the result to the provided StringBuilder.
member.param: Output buffer for the restored input string.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.convertCardDataCustom21(System.String)
member.summary: Converts card data in "facilityCode-cardNumber" format to an 8-digit octal string using the Custom 21 algorithm (facility * 65536 + cardNumber, then to octal).
member.returns: Octal string, or error message if the input is malformed.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetActiveAlarmDescription(System.Int32)
member.summary: Queries the alarms table for the description of an active alarm by its dynamic alarm ID. NOTE: Current implementation is a stub that returns empty string.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getAlarmLevel(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Returns the alarm priority level for the given event ID and device address. First checks PointEventCustomizations for address-specific overrides, then falls back to the alarms table default.
member.returns: Alarm priority level. Returns 1 if no match found.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getAlarmLevel(VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive)
member.summary: Convenience overload that extracts EventId and Address from an IAlarmActive object.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getAlarmDefinitions
member.summary: Returns all alarm definitions as key-value pairs of (eventId, defaultDescription). Strips % characters from descriptions.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getAlarmNote(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the note/comment attached to an alarm from the AlarmLogText table.
member.returns: AlarmNote with text, date, and author.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getDoorGroups
member.summary: Returns all door groups accessible to the current operator, filtered by the operator's permission boundaries.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getDoorGroupIDFromName(System.String)
member.summary: Looks up a door group ID by name (using SQL LIKE matching).

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetMasterDoorGroups
member.summary: Returns all master door groups accessible to the current operator, filtered by boundary permissions.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetFuntionGroups
member.summary: Returns all function groups accessible to the current operator. NOTE: Method name contains a typo ("Funtion" instead of "Function").

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getControllersInDoorGroupID(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns a list of controller address strings for all controllers that have doors in the specified door group.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.isValidAddingDoorGroup(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Validates whether a credential can be assigned to a door group by checking that the door group's access zones contain at least one controller in the credential's panel assignments.
member.returns: True if the credential can be added to the door group.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.isValidAddingMasterDoorGroup(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Validates whether a credential can be assigned to a master door group.
member.returns: True if the credential can be added to the master door group.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.isValidAddingFunctionGroup(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates whether a credential can be assigned to a function group (by name). Looks up the function group ID then delegates to the ID-based overload.
member.returns: True if the credential can be added to the function group.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.isValidAddingFunctionGroup(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Validates whether a credential can be assigned to a function group (by ID).
member.returns: True if the credential can be added to the function group.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.isOperator
member.summary: Checks if the current Windows user (Environment.UserName) exists in the Velocity Operators table.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getOperatorID(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the operator ID for the given username, or -1 if not found. Opens a separate SQL connection (not from the pool).
member.returns: Operator ID, or -1 if not found.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.RetrieveOperatorName(System.Int32)
member.summary: STUB — returns empty string. Intended to retrieve an operator's display name by ID.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.AddOperator(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Requires admin privileges. Creates a new operator (if not already existing) and assigns them to a security group/role.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.DeleteOperator(System.Int32)
member.summary: Requires admin privileges. Deletes an operator and all their group memberships.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.RemoveOperatorRole(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Requires admin privileges. Removes an operator from a specific security group. Role ID must be greater than 1 (cannot remove the base role).

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetListOfRoles(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the list of security group IDs assigned to the given operator.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.isOperatorInGroup(System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if the current operator belongs to the specified security group.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.isOperatorInGroupList(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32})
member.summary: Checks if the current operator belongs to any of the specified security groups.
member.param: List of group IDs to check.

member.summary: Extracts the door ID from a software event.

member.summary: Extracts the door ID from a transaction event.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.BeginTransaction
member.summary: Creates a new download transaction via stored procedure sp_CreateTransaction. Used to batch credential changes before sending them to controllers.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.EndTransaction(System.Int32,System.Collections.ArrayList)
member.summary: Finalizes a transaction by inserting command sets for the specified controllers and sending the download command (type 98) to the Velocity server.
member.param: ArrayList of controllers to download to.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.EndTransactionEx(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sends a transaction completion message to the Velocity server with a specific transaction type. Common types: 98 (command string), 99 (normal).

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.SendMessage(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Sends an encrypted message to the Velocity server via the TCP socket. Used for inter-component communication.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetIntegratedEvent
member.summary: Creates and returns a new IIntegratedEvent object to be populated and sent via SendIntegratedEvent().

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.SendIntegratedEvent(VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent,System.String)
member.summary: Sends an integrated event to the Velocity server. Validates the event has an address, checks it exists in the database, then sends it as a software event (message ID 19) via the encrypted socket.
member.exception: Thrown if the address is empty or the event definition is not found.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getConn
member.summary: Retrieves a SQL connection from the internal pool. Auto-connects if not currently connected. Returns null on failure.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.releaseConn(VelocityAdapter.ISQLConnect)
member.summary: Returns a SQL connection to the pool. Safe to call with null.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.enableSQLPool
member.summary: Enables the internal SQL connection pool (default behavior).

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.disableSQLPool
member.summary: Disables the connection pool — each getConn() call creates a new connection.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.resetAllDBConnections
member.summary: Reinitializes the SQL connection pool, closing all existing connections and creating fresh ones.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.setSQLTimeout(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the command timeout for all SQL queries executed through the SDK.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.setMiscProp(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets a named property in the miscproperties table. Inserts if the property doesn't exist, updates if it does.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.getMiscProp(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a named property value from the miscproperties table. Returns empty string if not found.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.setWindowsNames(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the Windows username and hostname for the current session. Used when running as a service or when the Windows identity doesn't match the desired operator context.

member.summary: Manually sets the operator ID and site ID. Used for testing or service-level overrides.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.setOID(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the operator ID directly.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.setCodePage(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the character encoding code page for text processing.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.StartDiagnosticsMode
member.summary: Enables diagnostics mode — the SDK will begin firing Diagnostic events with controller diagnostic data.

member.summary: Looks up a person/user by their credential match code.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.GetLicensesOnServer

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.VelocityServer.checkLicenseOnServer(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Validates whether a specific product license is present and valid on the server. Queries the Licenses table and validates against the license manager.
member.param: Product name to check (e.g., SDK product identifier).
If true, uses a direct SQL connection instead of the pool.
member.returns: True if the license is valid.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive
member.summary: Represents an active (currently raised) alarm in the Velocity system. Delivered via the VelocityServer.AlarmActive event when a new alarm is triggered.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.AlarmId
member.summary: Unique identifier for this alarm instance (assigned when the alarm is raised). Used to acknowledge or clear the alarm.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.Description
member.summary: Human-readable event description, typically formatted with substituted parameters.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.ServerTime
member.summary: Timestamp recorded by the Velocity server when the event was received.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.DeviceTime
member.summary: Timestamp recorded by the device when the alarm condition was detected.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.EventId
member.summary: Numeric event type identifier.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.EventType
member.summary: Event classification string.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.DomainId
member.summary: Security domain ID — used to scope events to a specific tenant or partition.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.ServerId
member.summary: ID of the Velocity server that recorded this event.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.PortAddress
member.summary: Address of the communication port the alarm originated from.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.DTAddress
member.summary: Door/Touchscreen address — sub-address of the controller's main board.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.XAddress
member.summary: Expansion module address — sub-address for expansion boards.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.AlarmPriority
member.summary: Priority level of the alarm (1-99, higher = more severe). Used to color-code/sort alarms in the Velocity client.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.GlobalMessage
member.summary: System-wide message code, used for events broadcast across the Velocity system.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.TransactionType
member.summary: Numeric type code for the transaction associated with this alarm.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.ReportAsAlarm
member.summary: True if this event should be displayed as an alarm in the Velocity client.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.P1
member.summary: Generic parameter 1 — meaning depends on the alarm event type.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.P2
member.summary: Generic parameter 2 — meaning depends on the alarm event type.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.UID1
member.summary: Primary user ID associated with the alarm (typically the cardholder).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.UID2
member.summary: Secondary user ID associated with the alarm (typically an operator).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.Address
member.summary: Human-readable device address (e.g., "1.2.3" for port.controller.subdevice).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IAlarmActive.ControllerId
member.summary: ID of the controller where the alarm originated.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent
member.summary: Represents an event from an external source — typically reader-related events such as card reads, access granted/denied, door forced open, door held open, or other physical access events. Delivered via the VelocityServer.ExternalEvent event.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.Address
member.summary: Human-readable device address.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.AlarmLevelPriority
member.summary: Alarm priority level. Higher numbers indicate higher priority. 0 means not an alarm.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.ControllerTime
member.summary: Timestamp recorded by the controller when the event occurred.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.ControllerID
member.summary: ID of the controller that generated the event.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.ControllerModel
member.summary: Numeric model identifier of the controller (e.g., DIGI*TRAC M2, M8, MX, etc.).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.Description
member.summary: Human-readable event description.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.DomainID
member.summary: Security domain ID.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.DTAddress
member.summary: Door/Touchscreen sub-address.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.EventID
member.summary: Numeric event type identifier.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.EventType
member.summary: Numeric event category code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.FromState
member.summary: Previous state of the device (e.g., "Secure", "Closed"). Useful for state-transition events.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.GlobalMessage
member.summary: System-wide message code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.Parm1
member.summary: Generic parameter — meaning depends on event type.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.Parm2
member.summary: Generic parameter — meaning depends on event type.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.PortAddress
member.summary: Address of the communication port.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.ReportAsAlarm
member.summary: True if this event should be displayed as an alarm.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.ServerTime
member.summary: Timestamp recorded by the Velocity server.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.ServerID
member.summary: ID of the Velocity server.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.ToState
member.summary: New state of the device after the event (e.g., "Open", "Alarm").

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.TransactionType
member.summary: Numeric transaction type code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IExternalEvent.VelocityEventType
member.summary: Categorical name for the event type as defined in Velocity (e.g., "Access Granted", "Door Forced").

member.summary: ID of the controller that generated the event.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IInternalEvent.ControllerModel
member.summary: Numeric model identifier of the controller.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IInternalEvent.Description
member.summary: Human-readable event description.

member.summary: Security domain ID.

member.summary: Generic parameter — meaning depends on event type.

member.summary: Generic parameter — meaning depends on event type.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IInternalEvent.PortAddress
member.summary: Address of the communication port.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IInternalEvent.ReportAsAlarm
member.summary: True if this event should be displayed as an alarm.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IInternalEvent.ServerTime
member.summary: Timestamp recorded by the Velocity server.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IInternalEvent.ServerID
member.summary: ID of the Velocity server.

member.summary: Categorical name for the event type.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.ISoftwareEvent

member.summary: Workstation address or empty for software events.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ISoftwareEvent.Description
member.summary: Human-readable event description.

member.summary: Numeric event type identifier.

member.summary: Timestamp recorded by the Velocity server.

member.summary: ID of the object/component that triggered the event (e.g., a credential ID, door ID).

member.summary: Display name of the source object.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ISoftwareEvent.TimeStamp

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent
member.summary: Represents a transaction event — the most detailed event type, used for credential-based access activity. Includes full credential information (card data, PIN), reader/door identification, and zone tracking. Delivered via VelocityServer.SystemTransaction.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.Address
member.summary: Human-readable device address.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.AlarmLevelPriority
member.summary: Alarm priority level.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.CARD
member.summary: Card data string (the credential's card number/ID as read by the reader).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.ControllerTime
member.summary: Timestamp recorded by the controller.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.ControllerID
member.summary: ID of the controller that processed the transaction.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.Description
member.summary: Human-readable event description.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.Disposition
member.summary: Result of the access attempt — granted, denied, or denied for specific reasons (unknown card, wrong time, etc.). See the Disposition enum.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.DomainID
member.summary: Security domain ID.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.DoorOrExpansion
member.summary: Indicates whether the transaction occurred at a door (0) or an expansion module reader (1).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.DTAddress
member.summary: Door/Touchscreen sub-address.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.EventID
member.summary: Numeric event type identifier.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.EventType
member.summary: Event classification string.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.FromZone
member.summary: Zone the user was in before the transaction (for anti-passback tracking).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.GlobalMessage
member.summary: System-wide message code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.PIN
member.summary: PIN entered at the keypad (if any).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.PortAddress
member.summary: Address of the communication port.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.Reader
member.summary: Reader number on the controller (1-8 typically).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.ReaderType
member.summary: Numeric type code for the reader (Wiegand, magstripe, OSDP, etc.).

member.summary: True if this event should be displayed as an alarm.

member.summary: Timestamp recorded by the Velocity server.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.ServerID
member.summary: ID of the Velocity server.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.ToZone
member.summary: Zone the user is moving into (the destination side of the door).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.TransactionType
member.summary: Strongly-typed transaction category. See TransactionEventType enum.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.UID1
member.summary: Primary user ID — the credential holder. 0 if the credential is unknown.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.UID2
member.summary: Secondary user ID — used in two-person rule scenarios.

member.summary: Categorical name for the event type.

member.summary: Expansion module sub-address.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ITransactionEvent.Zone
member.summary: Zone associated with the transaction (typically the destination zone).

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.IHirschMessage
member.summary: A general-purpose message from the Hirsch hardware platform. Used by AlarmSecured, AlarmOverride, and CommandError events. Contains less structured information than the typed event interfaces — use the MessageType and MessageValues to decode.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IHirschMessage.MessageID
member.summary: Unique identifier for this message instance.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IHirschMessage.Address
member.summary: Device address the message originated from.

member.summary: PC/server timestamp when the message was received.

member.summary: DIGI*TRAC controller timestamp when the message was generated.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IHirschMessage.EngineName
member.summary: Name of the Velocity engine/component that produced the message.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IHirschMessage.MessageType
member.summary: Numeric message type code that determines how to interpret MessageValues.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IHirschMessage.MessageDescription
member.summary: Human-readable description of the message.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IHirschMessage.MessageValues
member.summary: Pipe-delimited or formatted string containing the message parameters. Format depends on MessageType.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent
member.summary: A user-constructed event that can be sent into Velocity from a third-party integration. Unlike the read-only event interfaces, this is a read/write object — populate the fields then pass it to VelocityServer.SendIntegratedEvent(). The EventID must correspond to a pre-defined integrated event in the Velocity database. Get a new instance via VelocityServer.GetIntegratedEvent().

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.Address
member.summary: Required. Address string identifying the source of the event. Must not be empty when sent.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.TimeStamp
member.summary: Read-only timestamp set when the event is constructed.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.EventID
member.summary: Required. ID of the integrated event definition in the Velocity database. The event must be pre-registered.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.P1
member.summary: Generic string parameter 1 — substituted into the event description template.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.P2
member.summary: Generic string parameter 2 — substituted into the event description template.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.P3
member.summary: Generic string parameter 3 — substituted into the event description template.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.P4
member.summary: Generic string parameter 4 — substituted into the event description template.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.P5
member.summary: Generic string parameter 5 — substituted into the event description template.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.P6
member.summary: Generic string parameter 6 — substituted into the event description template.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.P7
member.summary: Generic string parameter 7 — substituted into the event description template.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.P8
member.summary: Generic string parameter 8 — substituted into the event description template.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IIntegratedEvent.P9
member.summary: Generic string parameter 9 — substituted into the event description template.

member.summary: Generic string parameter 10 — substituted into the event description template.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityException
member.summary: The general-purpose SDK exception. Thrown by most VelocityServer methods when an operation fails — connection failures, SQL errors, missing entities, malformed data, etc. The inner message typically contains the underlying exception's ToString() output.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityException.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty VelocityException.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a VelocityException with a message.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a VelocityException with a message and error code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Numeric error code passed to the constructor, or 0 if not specified.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityAccessDeniedException
member.summary: Thrown when the connecting operator is not authorized to access the Velocity system at all (e.g., not a registered operator, account disabled). Distinct from VelocityPermissionDeniedException, which indicates a permission failure for a specific component or action.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityAccessDeniedException.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty VelocityAccessDeniedException.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityAccessDeniedException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a VelocityAccessDeniedException with a message.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityAccessDeniedException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a VelocityAccessDeniedException with a message and error code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityAccessDeniedException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Numeric error code.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityPermissionDeniedException
member.summary: Thrown when the operator is authenticated but lacks the specific permission required for the requested operation (e.g., trying to delete a credential without delete permission, or accessing a component outside the operator's permission boundary).

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityPermissionDeniedException.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty VelocityPermissionDeniedException.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityPermissionDeniedException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a VelocityPermissionDeniedException with a message.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityPermissionDeniedException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a VelocityPermissionDeniedException with a message and error code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.VelocityPermissionDeniedException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Numeric error code.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.ValidationException
member.summary: Thrown when an entity fails validation rules — e.g., saving a person/credential with invalid field values, missing required data, or violating business rules enforced by the Velocity server.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.ValidationException.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty ValidationException.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.ValidationException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a ValidationException with a message.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.ValidationException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a ValidationException with a message and error code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.ValidationException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Numeric error code identifying the specific validation failure.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.FilterException
member.summary: Thrown when a filter object (PersonFilter, CredentialFilter) is invalid or contains incompatible criteria. Typically raised by GetPersons(filter) / GetCredentials(filter) if the filter is malformed.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.FilterException.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty FilterException.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.FilterException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a FilterException with a message.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.FilterException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a FilterException with a message and error code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.FilterException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Numeric error code.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.IntegratedEventException
member.summary: Thrown by VelocityServer.SendIntegratedEvent() when the integrated event cannot be sent — typically because the Address is empty or the EventID doesn't correspond to a registered event definition in the Velocity database.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.IntegratedEventException.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty IntegratedEventException.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.IntegratedEventException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an IntegratedEventException with a message.

member.summary: Creates an IntegratedEventException with a message and error code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.IntegratedEventException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Numeric error code.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.InvalidLicenseException
member.summary: Thrown when an SDK or Velocity feature is used without a valid license, or when license validation fails during connection.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.InvalidLicenseException.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty InvalidLicenseException.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.InvalidLicenseException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an InvalidLicenseException with a message.

member.summary: Creates an InvalidLicenseException with a message and error code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.InvalidLicenseException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Numeric error code.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.InvalidUserDefinedFieldDataException
member.summary: Thrown when saving a person/credential with user-defined field (UDF) values that don't match the configured UDF type or constraints (e.g., putting text into a numeric field, exceeding max length, violating a regex).

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.InvalidUserDefinedFieldDataException.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty InvalidUserDefinedFieldDataException.

member.summary: Creates an InvalidUserDefinedFieldDataException with a message and error code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.InvalidUserDefinedFieldDataException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Numeric error code.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.LockedComponentException
member.summary: Thrown when attempting to modify a component (person, credential, door, controller) that is currently locked by another operator or process. Velocity uses pessimistic locking on certain entities to prevent concurrent edit conflicts.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.LockedComponentException.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty LockedComponentException.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.LockedComponentException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a LockedComponentException with a message.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.LockedComponentException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a LockedComponentException with a message and error code.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.LockedComponentException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Numeric error code.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException
member.summary: Thrown when a person/operator lookup fails — e.g., GetPersonByID with a non-existent ID. Unlike the other exceptions, this one exposes a UserID property instead of ErrorCode so the caller can identify which user wasn't found.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty UserNotFoundException.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a UserNotFoundException with a message.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a UserNotFoundException with a message and the user ID that was not found.
member.param: The user ID that was searched for but not found.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Exceptions.UserNotFoundException.UserID
member.summary: The ID that was searched for but not found.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson
member.summary: Represents a person (cardholder) in the Velocity system. The fundamental record for access control — every credential is assigned to a person, and access decisions are tied to the person's group memberships and credentials. Get instances via VelocityServer.GetPersonByID(), GetPersons(), GetNewPerson(), or GetNewPersonBasedOnTemplateID(). After modifying a person, call Update() to save changes (or Add() for new persons).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.PersonID
member.summary: Unique identifier for the person. Assigned by the system when Add() is called.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.FirstName
member.summary: First/given name.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.LastName
member.summary: Last/family name.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.Title
member.summary: Title or position (e.g., "Manager", "Dr.").

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.Suffix
member.summary: Name suffix (e.g., "Jr.", "III").

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.MiddleName
member.summary: Middle name.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.PhotoID
member.summary: ID reference to the person's photo record. Use GetPhoto()/SetPhoto() to read/write.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.SignatureID
member.summary: ID reference to the person's signature record. Use GetSignature()/SetSignature().

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.LastUpdated
member.summary: Timestamp of the last modification to this person record.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.UserDefinedFields
member.summary: Enumerable collection of user-defined field values for this person.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.Credentials
member.summary: Enumerable collection of credentials assigned to this person.

member.summary: Inserts a new person record into the database. Validates required user-defined fields.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.Add(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Inserts a new person record, optionally bypassing required UDF validation.
member.param: If true, skips validation of required user-defined fields.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.Update
member.summary: Saves changes to an existing person record.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.Update(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Saves changes to an existing person record, optionally bypassing required UDF validation.
member.param: If true, skips validation of required user-defined fields.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.Delete
member.summary: Deletes the person and all their credentials from the database.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.People.IPerson.toggleUdfModified
member.summary: Marks user-defined fields as modified, forcing them to be saved on the next Update().

member.summary: Returns the person's photo as a byte array (typically JPEG).

member.summary: Returns the system default/fallback photo.

member.summary: Sets the person's photo from a byte array.

member.summary: Returns the person's signature as a byte array.

member.summary: Sets the person's signature from a byte array.

member.summary: Sets a user-defined field value by its caption (display name).

member.summary: Sets a user-defined field value by its numeric field number.

member.summary: Represents a group of persons. Person groups are used to organize cardholders for permission assignment, reporting, and bulk operations. A person can belong to multiple groups.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.People.IPersonGroup.PersonGroupName
member.summary: Display name of the group.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.People.PersonAttribute
member.summary: Identifies which standard IPerson field a PersonFilter query operates on. Used as the first argument to PersonFilter.AddQuery().

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.People.PersonFilter
member.summary: Abstract filter object used to query persons. Build a filter by calling AddQuery() for each criterion, then pass the filter to VelocityServer.GetPersons(filter). Get a new instance via VelocityServer.GetPersonFilter().

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.People.PersonFilter.getUdfList
member.summary: Returns a list of user-defined field IDs referenced by the filter.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.People.PersonFilter.UndoLastQuery
member.summary: Removes the most recently added query condition.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.People.PersonFilter.AddParens
member.summary: Adds parentheses to group conditions for boolean precedence (e.g., (A AND B) OR C).

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.People.PersonFilter.AddQuery(VelocityAdapter.People.PersonAttribute,System.Object,VelocityAdapter.Filters.ComparisonOperator,VelocityAdapter.Filters.LogicalOperator)
member.summary: Adds a query condition on a standard person field.
member.param: Which person field to filter on.
How to compare (EQUAL, LIKE, GREATER_THAN, etc.).
How to combine with previous conditions (AND, OR).

member.summary: Adds a query condition on a user-defined field.
member.param: Logical operator combining with previous conditions.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential
member.summary: Represents a credential — a card, PIN, biometric, or other authenticator that can be presented at a reader for access. Credentials are owned by persons (or marked as unassigned/guest) and grant access to specific doors, door groups, master door groups, or function groups. Get instances via VelocityServer.GetCredentialByID(), GetCredentials(), or by adding new credentials with AddUnassignedCredential(), AddGuestCredential(), or IPerson.AddCredential().

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.PersonID
member.summary: ID of the person this credential is assigned to. -1 for unassigned, -2 for guest credentials.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.CredentialID
member.summary: Unique credential identifier.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.ReaderControlGroupID
member.summary: ID of the reader control group governing where this credential can be used.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.CredentialTemplateID
member.summary: ID of the credential template this credential was created from (or 0 if not from a template).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.PIN
member.summary: Personal identification number for keypad credentials.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.PINLength
member.summary: Length of the PIN.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.MATCH
member.summary: Match code derived from the card data — used by controllers for fast lookup. Generated from CardData via GenerateMatch().

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.StampNo
member.summary: Card stamp/serial number printed on the badge.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.CardData
member.summary: Raw card data string as read from the credential.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.CardType
member.summary: Card format/encoding (Wiegand 26-bit, ABA, FASCN, etc.). See CredentialCardType.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.HostDescription
member.summary: Description of the credential.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.IDF
member.summary: IDF (Identification Form) — the type of authentication mechanism (card, PIN, dual, etc.).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.HostActivationDate
member.summary: Date/time the credential becomes active.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.LastAccessTime
member.summary: Timestamp of the last successful access using this credential.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.HostExpirationDate
member.summary: Date/time the credential expires.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.HostExpirationFunction
member.summary: What happens at expiration: disable, delete, or disable and unassign.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.HostExpirationUDF
member.summary: User-defined field number used for custom expiration logic.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.fDeactivated
member.summary: True if the credential is currently deactivated.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.IsRevoked
member.summary: True if the credential has been revoked.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.HostExpirationUsed
member.summary: Whether the expiration date is enforced.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.HostExpirationTaskCompleted
member.summary: Whether the expiration handling task has completed.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.HostIsActivated
member.summary: Whether the credential is currently activated.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.DuressDigit
member.summary: Duress digit appended to the PIN to silently trigger a duress alarm.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.fGlobalize
member.summary: Whether the credential is downloaded to all controllers (global) vs. specific controllers.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.LimitingRule
member.summary: Type of access count limiting (none, day-based, use-based, absentee). See LimitRule.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.Count
member.summary: Numeric counter used by the limiting rule.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.fAutoDelete
member.summary: If true, the credential is automatically deleted at expiration.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.SecurityLevel
member.summary: Security clearance level (1-99, controllers compare to door's required level).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.IsLinked
member.summary: True if the credential is linked to its template — changes to the template propagate to this credential.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.TwoPersonRule
member.summary: Two-person integrity rule (normal, A-side, B-side, executive override).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.fTagUser
member.summary: Marks the credential holder for special handling/reporting.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.fAlertUser
member.summary: Generate alerts/notifications for activity by this credential.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.fPBExecutiveOverride
member.summary: Allow this credential to bypass anti-passback rules.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.fSNUXEnabled
member.summary: Special needs user extension — enables extended door times for accessibility.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.HostIssueNumber
member.summary: Issue number tracking sequential reissues of the same credential.

member.summary: Free-form status comment.

member.summary: The badge design template assigned to this credential.

member.summary: Globally unique identifier for the credential.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredential.LastAccessName
member.summary: Name/location of the last access point used.

member.summary: Saves changes to the credential.

member.summary: Saves changes to the credential, optionally forcing an immediate download to controllers.

member.summary: Saves changes with full control over download behavior and transaction pooling.
member.param: If true, forces an immediate download.
If true, batches the change with other transactions.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ICredentialTemplate
member.summary: Represents a credential template — a reusable definition of credential properties that can be applied to new or existing credentials. Templates standardize properties like access groups, expiration handling, security level, and limit rules across many credentials. Get instances via VelocityServer.GetCredentialTemplates(). Apply a template via VelocityServer.UpdateUserCredentialWithTemplate() or IPerson.AddCredentialFromTemplate().

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Credential.IBadgeTemplate
member.summary: Represents a badge design template. Badge templates define the visual layout of physical badges (background, fields displayed, photo placement, etc.). Get instances via VelocityServer.GetBadgeTemplates() or GetBadgeTemplateByID().

member.summary: Display name of the badge template.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Credential.IBadgeTemplate.BadgeTemplateID
member.summary: Unique identifier for the badge template.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Credential.CredentialFilter
member.summary: Abstract filter object used to query credentials. Build a filter by calling AddQuery() for each criterion, then pass the filter to VelocityServer.GetCredentials(filter). Get a new instance via VelocityServer.GetCredentialFilter().

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.Credential.CredentialFilter.UndoLastQuery
member.summary: Removes the most recently added query condition.

member.summary: Adds parentheses to group conditions for boolean precedence.

member.summary: Adds a query condition.
member.param: Which credential field to filter on.
How to combine with previous conditions.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Credential.CredentialCardType
member.summary: Specifies the format/encoding of a credential's card data. Used by ICredential.CardType and GenerateMatch().

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Credential.CredentialIDF
member.summary: The IDF (Identification Form) of a credential — the type of authentication mechanism it uses. Used by ICredential.IDF.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Credential.LimitRule
member.summary: Determines how a credential's access count is limited. Used by ICredential.LimitingRule in conjunction with Count.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Credential.TwoPersonRules
member.summary: Specifies a credential's role in a two-person integrity (2PI) rule. Two-person rules require two valid credentials at a single reader to grant access.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Credential.ExpirationFunction
member.summary: Determines what happens to a credential when it expires. Used by ICredential.HostExpirationFunction.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Credential.CredentialAttribute
member.summary: Identifies which ICredential field a CredentialFilter query operates on. Used as the first argument to CredentialFilter.AddQuery().

member.summary: DIGI*TRAC controller sub-address.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Address.sAddress
member.summary: String representation of the complete address.

member.summary: Historical record of an external/reader event from [dbo].[Log_External]. Returned by VelocityServer.GetExternalEvents().

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.LogTransaction
member.summary: Historical record of a transaction (card read / access event) from [dbo].[Log_Transactions]. Returned by VelocityServer.GetLogTransactions(). The most detailed log record type — includes credential, reader, zone, and disposition information.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Disposition
member.summary: Result of an access attempt at a reader. Used by ITransactionEvent.Disposition to indicate whether and why an access attempt was granted, denied, or pending.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.TransactionEventType
member.summary: Strongly-typed transaction category. Used by ITransactionEvent.TransactionType. Identifies the kind of action that triggered the transaction event — access attempts, manual overrides, control commands, etc.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.BoundaryTypes
member.summary: Identifies the type of an entity used in Velocity's permission boundary system. Permission boundaries scope an operator's view to specific subsets of objects.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.ComponentTypes
member.summary: Component type identifiers used by ComponentSupport.GetComponentPermission() to query an operator's permissions on specific component types. A subset of ObjectTypes focused on permission-checkable components.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.ObjectTypes
member.summary: System object type identifiers used throughout Velocity for entity categorization. Closely related to BoundaryTypes but used in slightly different contexts.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Controllers.IController
member.summary: Represents a Hirsch DIGI*TRAC controller — the hardware device that manages doors, readers, inputs, and relays at a physical location. Get instances via VelocityServer.GetControllerById() or GetControllers().

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands
member.summary: The RPC (Remote Procedure Call) command interface — the primary way to control hardware through the Velocity SDK. Access via VelocityServer.RPC. All command methods return bool indicating success/failure and take a ref string sResponse parameter that receives the server's response message. RPC commands are subject to the operator's permission boundaries.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.forgivePassbackForCredential(System.Int32)
member.summary: Clears the anti-passback violation state for a specific credential, allowing them to enter again.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.GetAllInputs
member.summary: Returns all inputs (base + expansion) across all controllers.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.GetAllRelays
member.summary: Returns all relays (base + expansion) across all controllers.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.GetOperatorGroups
member.summary: Returns the operator's group membership information.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.GetCommandSets
member.summary: Returns all stored command sets in the system.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.GetDoors
member.summary: Returns all doors visible to the current operator.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.GetActiveAlarms
member.summary: Returns all currently active (unacknowledged) alarms.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.GetInputs
member.summary: Returns base alarm inputs.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.GetExpansionInputs
member.summary: Returns expansion module inputs.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.GetRelays(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns base relays.
member.param: If true, related relays are grouped.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.GetExpansionRelays
member.summary: Returns expansion module relays.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.GetControlZones
member.summary: Returns all control zones.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.AlarmAcknowledge(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Acknowledges an active alarm. Fires the AlarmAcknowledged event.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.AlarmClear(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Clears an alarm (after acknowledging). Fires the AlarmCleared event.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.DoorMomentaryAccess(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Pulses the door unlock relay for the configured duration (typically 3-5 seconds). Equivalent to a card swipe grant.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.DoorUnlock(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Unlocks the door (continuously, until relocked).

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.DoorRelock(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Relocks a door that was previously unlocked.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.DoorLockDown(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Lockdown — door cannot be unlocked even with valid credentials. Used for emergency lockdown.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.DoorLockDownRelease(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Releases the door lockdown.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.ExecuteCommandSet(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Executes a predefined command set (a saved sequence of commands).

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.DownloadAllCredentials(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Downloads all credentials to the specified controller. Used after bulk credential changes.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.DownloadControllerConfig(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Downloads the full controller configuration.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.DownloadControllerTime(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Synchronizes the controller's clock to the server time.

member.name: M:VelocityAdapter.RPC.IRPCCommands.DownloadControllerDate(System.Int32,System.String@)
member.summary: Synchronizes the controller's date.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.ISQLConnect
member.summary: Wraps a pooled SqlConnection for use within the SDK's connection pool. Obtained via VelocityServer.getConn() and returned via releaseConn(). Most consumers don't need to interact with this directly.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ISQLConnect.Used
member.summary: Whether this connection is currently checked out from the pool.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ISQLConnect.Connection
member.summary: The underlying ADO.NET SQL connection — use this for raw queries.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ISQLConnect.SessionID
member.summary: Unique identifier for this pool slot.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ISQLConnect.LastAccessed
member.summary: Timestamp the connection was last used (for pool eviction).

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.IComponent
member.summary: Represents an operator's permissions for a specific component type. Returned by ComponentSupport.GetComponentPermission() to check what an operator can do with a given component category.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IComponent.ComponentType
member.summary: The component type these permissions apply to.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IComponent.CanAddNew
member.summary: Whether the operator can create new instances of this component.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IComponent.CanDelete
member.summary: Whether the operator can delete existing instances.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IComponent.CanView
member.summary: Whether the operator can view instances.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IComponent.CanSave
member.summary: Whether the operator can modify and save existing instances.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.IComponent.SubPermissions
member.summary: Granular sub-permissions keyed by name.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.ISubPermission
member.summary: A granular permission entry for sub-components within a parent component.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ISubPermission.Key
member.summary: Identifier for the permission (e.g., a specific field or action).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ISubPermission.CanView
member.summary: Whether the operator can view this sub-component.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ISubPermission.CanModify
member.summary: Whether the operator can modify this sub-component.

member.summary: Command set identifier string.

member.summary: Database ID of the stored command set.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.CommandSets.IStoredCommandSet.Name

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.ControlZoneObject
member.summary: A data class representing a control zone with its associated relay assignments. Returned as a list by VelocityServer.GetControlZones(). The relay arrays index into the controller's relay tables (RY1-RY8 for base, XRY1-XRY64 for expansion).

member.summary: ID of the controller this zone belongs to.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ControlZoneObject.Name
member.summary: Display name of the control zone.

member.summary: Unique zone identifier within the controller.

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ControlZoneObject.BaseRelays
member.summary: Array of base relay IDs in this zone (RY1-RY8).

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.ControlZoneObject.ExpansionRelays
member.summary: Array of expansion relay IDs in this zone (XRY1-XRY64).

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.ControlZones.IControlZone
member.summary: Represents a control zone — a logical grouping of devices that can be controlled as a unit. Returned by IRPCCommands.GetControlZones(). Use IRPCCommands ControlZone* methods to control the zone.

member.summary: Zone index within the controller.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.Alarms.IAlarm
member.summary: Represents an active alarm in the system. Returned by IRPCCommands.GetActiveAlarms(). A simpler alarm interface than IAlarmActive (which is delivered via real-time events).

member.summary: Unique alarm identifier. Use this with IRPCCommands.AlarmAcknowledge() and AlarmClear().

member.name: P:VelocityAdapter.Alarms.IAlarm.Description
member.summary: Human-readable alarm description.

member.summary: Address of the source device.

member.summary: Alarm priority level.

member.name: T:VelocityAdapter.UserDefinedFields.IUserDefinedField
member.summary: A user-defined field with both metadata (inherited from IUserDefinedFieldInfo) and a value. Used in IPerson.UserDefinedFields to read/write a person's custom field values.

member.summary: Unique field identifier.

member.summary: Display name shown in the Velocity UI.

member.summary: Field data type (text, number, date, dropdown, etc.).

member.summary: True if this field must be populated when saving a person.
